title: 09 Rei
wikitext:
[]: 09 Rei Post by 514nvM!00truth- » Fri Oct 30, 2015 12:04 pm They said - this must not be revealed. No one will believe. I said - not a big deal. Half of year and this will be no mystery anymore. Third Impact Child. Real one or just illusion... But if the world is real, then why his end and beginning should be not?

[]: Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 30, 2015 12:08 pm It's a pity that whoever made that can't spell "archives". And I don't see the final film appearing in a bare six months, either.

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Oct 30, 2015 1:07 pm pwhodges wrote: It's a pity that whoever made that can't spell "archives".

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Oct 30, 2015 1:35 pm Typically movies will start full-blown advertising far ahead of time, yeah. I agree that release is probably not in the near future.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Oct 30, 2015 2:07 pm If that means Shinji and ReiQ hooked up it'd bug me, since that would mean he'd traded one mother clone for another -- kinda skeevy IMO. But if it meant she was formally recognized as his sister that would be kinda cool. Too bad it's just a fan idea, but who knows?

[]: Post by Ray » Fri Oct 30, 2015 2:55 pm In his situation, desperate for any kind of human connection, even a fake one he'd probably take it. Ickyness of potential incest aside. Or Maybe she changed her name out of respect to him. But it's not like she'd be accepted having Ikari for a last name. That's like calling yourself Rei Hitler/Hussein.

[]: Post by pwhodges » Fri Oct 30, 2015 3:15 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Every single page of the 3.0 theatrical book says "achives."

[]: Post by unz » Fri Oct 30, 2015 3:55 pm Bagheera wrote: If that means Shinji and ReiQ hooked up it'd bug me, since that would mean he'd traded one mother clone for another -- kinda skeevy IMO. But if it meant she was formally recognized as his sister that would be kinda cool. Too bad it's just a fan idea, but who knows?

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Oct 30, 2015 4:03 pm If Rei Q does choose a new identity for herself, I'll be surprised if she keeps either of her names and doesn't get a whole new name entirely.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 30, 2015 4:17 pm That doctored image almost had me going for a second... Deep in my heart, I continue to hope that Tentative Rei's new name is Tsukiko .

[]: Post by unz » Fri Oct 30, 2015 4:36 pm That's one cute name.

[]: Post by Ray » Fri Oct 30, 2015 4:52 pm Wait, it's fake? Damn!

[]: Post by Rei IV » Fri Oct 30, 2015 4:59 pm Reichu wrote: Deep in my heart, I continue to hope that Tentative Rei's new name is Tsukiko .

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 30, 2015 5:25 pm Rei IV : Well, there's still the "Black Moon" (in the script, that's what the weird goblet-shaped thing is called) to keep in mind... "Kurohime" is actually a surname, so how about Tsukiko Kurohime as her full name?

[]: Post by Rei IV » Fri Oct 30, 2015 7:12 pm Reichu wrote: Rei IV : Well, there's still the "Black Moon" (in the script, that's what the weird goblet-shaped thing is called) to keep in mind... "Kurohime" is actually a surname, so how about Tsukiko Kurohime as her full name?

[]: Post by Chuckman » Fri Oct 30, 2015 8:27 pm Bagheera wrote: If that means Shinji and ReiQ hooked up it'd bug me, since that would mean he'd traded one mother clone for another -- kinda skeevy IMO. But if it meant she was formally recognized as his sister that would be kinda cool. Too bad it's just a fan idea, but who knows?

[]: Post by Sachi » Fri Oct 30, 2015 8:30 pm Chuckman wrote: Is a man not entitled to the clone of his mom?

[]: Post by Bagheera » Sat Oct 31, 2015 1:27 am Sachi wrote: I feel as though his mom is more entitled to the clone of his mom, and wait, she already has Rei II!

[]: Post by Chuckman » Sat Oct 31, 2015 1:33 pm If Rei's body discorporated inside the Eva, isn't she just Lilith again?

[]: Post by Bagheera » Sat Oct 31, 2015 1:54 pm Chuckman wrote: If Rei's body discorporated inside the Eva, isn't she just Lilith again?
